## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run verify:pack`
- [ ] `npm run doctor` or documented reason it cannot pass

## Contract Impact

- [ ] No generated output contract changes
- [ ] Generated fixtures updated only when required by spec
- [ ] Public package contents unchanged or verified

## Security Impact

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, `.env` contents, private source, or proprietary generated config included
- [ ] No new network upload, telemetry, hosted execution, or install script behavior
- [ ] Local-first and explicit-write safety posture preserved

-
